title: As a user I want to be able to see the Epic Name as a column in Issue Navigator searches
description: Currently, using the Epic Link column only shows the epic's issue key.
text: As a user I want to be able to see the Epic Name as a column in Issue Navigator searchesCurrently, using the Epic Link column only shows the epic's issue key.

title: Change activity stream documentation regarding repository commits
description: It is not clear in [the documentation for activity stream|https://confluence.atlassian.com/display/JIRA/Adding+the+Activity+Stream+Gadget] which commits from repositories in DVCS accounts are shown.    It seems that only ones with smart commits linking to JIRA issues appear in activity stream.
text: Change activity stream documentation regarding repository commitsIt is not clear in [the documentation for activity stream|https://confluence.atlassian.com/display/JIRA/Adding+the+Activity+Stream+Gadget] which commits from repositories in DVCS accounts are shown.    It seems that only ones with smart commits linking to JIRA issues appear in activity stream.

title: Allow a numeric field to be specified Sprint tracking statistic for the Rapid Board
description: - Show the statistic in detail, editable in plan mode only  - If a Sprint is started warn if there is no estimate for an item that has the sprint tracking statistic
text: Allow a numeric field to be specified Sprint tracking statistic for the Rapid Board- Show the statistic in detail, editable in plan mode only  - If a Sprint is started warn if there is no estimate for an item that has the sprint tracking statistic

title: Make the Sprint Burndown chart use remaining estimate when the board has been configured that way
description: - Changes in the remaining estimate are burned down as they happen   - Time spent burns up   - Items that are added to the Sprint after its beginning are shown as scope change   - Items that are removed from the Sprint after its beginning are shown as scope change
text: Make the Sprint Burndown chart use remaining estimate when the board has been configured that way- Changes in the remaining estimate are burned down as they happen   - Time spent burns up   - Items that are added to the Sprint after its beginning are shown as scope change   - Items that are removed from the Sprint after its beginning are shown as scope change
